_description: AEMO Gen Info IDs and project slugs that have been manually consolidated into a parent project. The importer will skip these IDs instead of creating/updating separate records. The exporter will skip these project IDs when writing JSON files.
_usage: When consolidating staged projects (e.g. merging Stage 1 + Stage 2 into a single file with a stages array), add the deprecated AEMO ID and slug here, pointing to the parent project that absorbed it.

by_aemo_id._note_eraring: AEMO ID 1870 (eraring-big-battery) is the SURVIVING consolidated project. Do NOT skip it. The deprecated slug 'eraring-battery' is in by_slug below.

1523.reason: Reeves Plains Battery Stage 2 (AEMO ID 1523) is Stage 2 of the Reeves Plains Energy Hub BESS (AEMO ID 2906).

eraring-battery.reason: Merged into eraring-big-battery. The 460 MW 'eraring-battery' was Stages 1+3 only; eraring-big-battery (700 MW) is the full consolidated project.

reeves-plains-battery-stage-2.reason: Consolidated into parent as Stage 2. Reeves Plains Energy Hub is a single staged project (S1: 250 MW construction, S2: 250 MW development).

goyder-bess-stage-2.reason: Merged as Stage 2 of Goyder Battery

pleystowe-bess-kci.reason: Duplicate AEMO entry for same project
